evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 40399460. 2025/05/21 00:00. BACKGROUND: The COVID-19 pandemic has challenged the ability of healthcare 
systems to ensure the continuity of health services for patients with 
non-communicable diseases (NCDs). The issue of remote consultations has emerged. 
Before the COVID-19 pandemic, remote consultations were not routinely provided 
or covered by public health funding in Latvia. This study aimed to describe the
